metadata.description: Eight focused SEO + monetization skills for Claude Code, built from real 2026 recovery and monetization cases. Slash commands: /seo-rescue:rescue (orchestrator with routing table), /seo-rescue:seo-audit-free, /seo-rescue:post-core-update-recovery, /seo-rescue:seo-outreach-report, /seo-rescue:channel-economics-analyzer, /seo-rescue:competitor-deep-audit, /seo-rescue:psi-weekly-cron-baseline, /seo-rescue:ai-search-rescue, /seo-rescue:subscription-monetization-audit. Covers free-tools beginner audit, post-Core-Update recovery playbook, decision-maker PDF outreach report, channel economics analyzer (Amazon/OTTO/Shop profitability across 30+ marketplaces), competitor deep audit (DataForSEO-powered keyword-gap analysis), PSI weekly cron baseline (automated performance regression detection), AI search rescue (Google AI Overviews, AI Mode, ChatGPT, Perplexity citations), and subscription monetization audit (5-lever playbook with optional Stripe/Chargebee/Recurly CSV import for MRR / ARPU / churn / cohort analysis).

plugins.name: seo-rescue
plugins.description: Seven complementary SEO and e-commerce skills built from real 2026 recovery cases. Available as namespaced slash commands: /seo-rescue:rescue (orchestrator with routing table + sub-aliases like 'rescue audit <domain>' / 'rescue diagnose' / 'rescue report' / 'rescue channels' / 'rescue competitors' / 'rescue psi-baseline' / 'rescue ai-search'), /seo-rescue:seo-audit-free [domain] (free-tier audit using only Google's tools), /seo-rescue:post-core-update-recovery [domain] (4-phase Authority-First recovery framework, pure Markdown skill, ~6-12 month timeline), /seo-rescue:seo-outreach-report [domain] (10-chapter A4 PDF for non-technical decision-makers via Sistrix + DataForSEO + PSI v5, Chrome-headless render without Puppeteer, ~$0.05-$0.50 per domain), /seo-rescue:channel-economics-analyzer (per-channel P&L for 30+ marketplaces incl. Amazon, OTTO, Kaufland, eBay, Zalando, Bol.com, CDiscount, Walmart, Etsy, Wayfair, TikTok Shop, Faire, Ankorstore), /seo-rescue:competitor-deep-audit [domain] (DataForSEO SERP-overlap + keyword-gap analysis, prioritized opportunity list, ~$0.10-$0.50), /seo-rescue:psi-weekly-cron-baseline (automated weekly PageSpeed Insights tracking with regression alerts, launchd/systemd/GHA-compatible, free), /seo-rescue:ai-search-rescue [domain] (visibility recovery for Google AI Overviews + AI Mode + ChatGPT + Perplexity + Bing Copilot + Claude.ai search with three-layer measurement and seven optimization tactics). Complements existing audit-focused skills like claude-seo with rescue-framing, decision-maker communication, channel-level financial analysis, free-tier workflows, and generative-engine optimization. MIT, zero npm runtime dependencies, security-hardened with documented threat model.
